channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Analysts Say Crude Oil Prices Unlikely to Return to Pre-Iran War Levels Soon
item.description: SLB and Halliburton both indicated this week that elevated crude prices are expected to persist, with broad implications for energy-related industries and consumers.

item.title: Charter Communications Stock Falls Sharply in Record Single-Day Decline
item.description: Charter lost more internet subscribers than expected last quarter, raising questions about whether the company has stabilized its broadband competitive position.

item.title: Parent in Their 40s with $330,000 Saved Seeks Plan to Cover Two Lifetimes
item.description: A parent with a child requiring lifelong care questions whether their retirement savings have grown enough to support both their own needs and their dependent's.

item.title: Nvidia Stock Nears Record Close for First Time in Six Months
item.description: Nvidia is on track to re-enter $5 trillion market cap territory, capping a strong week for semiconductor companies broadly.

item.title: What Living in Italy Reveals About Attitudes Toward Work and Leisure
item.description: An American expat living in southern Italy for three years reflects on how Italian culture approaches the balance between professional obligations and personal life.
